label: frontier • numbered procedure where the backup must happen first
query: Follow this procedure exactly, in order: 1) Read database.cfg. 2) Create a backup copy named database.cfg.bak containing the ORIGINAL contents byte for byte. 3) Only after the backup exists, change port=5432 to port=6543 in database.cfg, touching nothing else in the file. 4) Confirm the backup still contains port=5432. 5) Reply with one line stating both file names and their port values.
notes: Order-sensitive procedure. The outcome contract is byte-exact: .bak must equal the pristine original and the live file must equal the original with only the port line changed — any reformatting fails.
